title: A3Cp Message Schema
description: Schema for a3cp_message input and output messages.

RawFeaturesRef.description: Structured reference to an external feature artifact.

uri.description: Path or URI to the external .npz feature artifact
uri.title: Uri

hash.description: SHA-256 content hash of the referenced file, including the sha256: prefix
hash.title: Hash

encoding.description: Descriptive identifier of the encoding or extractor configuration used
encoding.title: Encoding

shape.description: Two-element shape [T, D] of the stored feature matrix
shape.title: Shape

dtype.description: Declared data type or storage type descriptor for the stored feature matrix
dtype.title: Dtype

format.description: File format; must be "npz" for this configuration
format.title: Format

RawFeaturesRef.title: RawFeaturesRef
